name: Annette

skills.name: Whisperwind
skills.description: Gains Mana and increased cooldown speed while moving. If there are teammates nearby, also gains Movement Speed.

skills.name: Gust Force
skills.description:
Conjures a persistent magic circle at the target location.
The magic circle damages and slows enemy units.
The magic circle grants Movement Speed to teammates.

skills.name: Wind Cuffs
skills.description:
Fires an orb in the target direction, gaining a shield and Movement Speed.
The orb damages enemies it hits.
The orb grants a shield to teammates it hits.
If the orb passes through a Gust Force magic circle, it pushes the magic circle to its destination.

skills.name: Hurricane Wall
skills.description:
Conjures a barrier around herself, knocking back enemies and dealing damage. Enemies that touch the barrier take damage and are stunned. Teammates within the barrier gain crowd control immunity.
Untargetable while channeling.

skillsZh.name: 風語
skillsZh.description: 安奈特移動時減少技能冷卻並獲得法力值，附近有隊友時自身獲得加速。

skillsZh.name: 風起雲湧
skillsZh.description:
安奈特在指定位置召喚持續生效的法陣。
法陣對敵方單位造成傷害和減速。
法陣為友方單位提供加速。

skillsZh.name: 風之守護
skillsZh.description:
安奈特朝指定方向發射光球，並使自身獲得護盾和加速。
光球對命中的敵人造成傷害。
光球為命中的隊友提供護盾。
光球經過【風起雲湧】的法陣時，會將法陣推至終點。

skillsZh.name: 煦風屏障
skillsZh.description:
安奈特在自身周圍召喚屏障擊退敵人並造成傷害，對觸碰屏障的敵人造成傷害和暈眩，屏障內的隊友獲得霸體。
引導期間安奈特無法鎖定為目標。

tips: Build: Mask of Agony, Augur's Word, Breakthrough Robe.
tipsZh: 安奈特（遊走）：梯度 A，勝率 49.38%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：痛苦面具、時之預言、破繭之衣.

faqs.question: Is Annette good in current season?
faqs.answer: Annette is Tier A Support with 49.38% win rate, 0.69% pick rate, and 0.77% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Annette build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mask of Agony, Augur's Word, Breakthrough Robe, Frozen Breath, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Annette?
faqs.answer: Pick Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Strong into Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.

faqsZh.question: 安奈特 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 安奈特 為 A 梯度，勝率 49.38%、選取 0.69%、禁用 0.77%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 安奈特 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：痛苦面具、時之預言、破繭之衣、凝冰之息、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 安奈特？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。安奈特 克制 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Weak into: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable；被克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable
